word: H7750 - שׂוּט - sûwṭ - soot - Turn aside to

sections.paragraph:
Original: סוּט שׂוּט

Transliteration: śûṭ sûṭ

Phonetic: soot

BDB Definition:

  1. to swerve, fall away
    1. (Qal)
      1. to swerve, fall away
      2. those falling away (participle)

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 2240

Part(s) of speech: Verb
